description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12), PyTorch versions (2.5.1+cpu, 2.6.0+cpu, 2.7.1+cpu, 2.8.0+cpu) on ubuntu-latest. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies including PyTorch and Triton, install the package, and run tests with pytest.
